title: BASIC DETAILS ABOUT IT
content: ESAT 2026 is conducted across multiple phases for students moving to Classes VII, VIII, IX, X, XI, and XII. The test assesses fundamental understanding of core subjects and logical reasoning.

title: REGISTRATION FORM
content: To begin your scholarship journey, please fill out the Registration Portal provided on the right side of this page. Ensure all details like Class and Program are selected correctly to receive the appropriate test syllabus.

title: TEST SYLLABUS
content: The syllabus covers Class-appropriate Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/Biology, and Mental Ability. Detailed topic-wise syllabus will be sent to your registered email after successful registration.

title: BENEFITS OF ESAT
content:
• Up to 100% Scholarship on Tuition Fees.
  • National Benchmarking against thousands of students.
  • Detailed Performance Analysis (AI-driven reports).
  • Priority Admission for upcoming 2026-27 Batches.

title: TEST PROCESS
content:
1

Register Online: Fill the registration form on the right.

2

Admit Card: Receive details via Email/WhatsApp.

3

Exam Day: Appear at the designated Ekalavya Center.

4

Results: Declared within 7 days of the test.

title: HEAR FROM ESAT SCHOLAR
content:
"ESAT was a turning point for me. The test pattern was very similar to competitive exams, and winning a scholarship motivated me to work even harder."

Aditya Verma

IIT-JEE 2026 Aspirant
